name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BalancerCollisionsReactionHelper.TimeToForward
summary: Time after a forwards impact before forwardMode is called (leave sometime for a rebound or brace - the min of 0.1 is to ensure fallOverWall can start although it probably needs only 1or2 frames for the probes to return).
remarks:
Default value = 0.5f.
            Min value = 0.1f.
            Max value = 2.0f.
